category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Uganda market under UNBS PVoC and Q-Mark with Ministry of Gender and Labour occupational framing, and adopter alignment to EN 149 through UNBS technical references.

title.en: China-to-Uganda PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入乌干达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入烏干達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator documentation (KN95 / GB 2626, GB 19083 for medical-protective products) against Uganda UNBS requirements, including mandatory PVoC, Certificate of Conformity, Q-Mark, occupational safety under Ministry of Gender and Labour, importer responsibility, ports, 240 V and 50 Hz power declaration, and UCC checks when radio functions are present.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE口罩（KN95 / GB 2626、以及医用类GB 19083）与乌干达UNBS要求对照，覆盖UNBS强制性出口前一致性核验、合格证、Q标、由妇女事务、性别与劳动部主导的职业安全框架、进口商义务、港口清关、240 V与50 Hz电源声明，以及具备无线功能时的UCC检查。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE口罩（KN95 / GB 2626、以及醫用類GB 19083）與烏干達UNBS要求對照，覆蓋UNBS強制性出口前一致性核驗、合格證、Q標、由婦女事務、性別與勞工部主導的職業安全框架、進口商義務、港口清關、240 V與50 Hz電源聲明，以及具備無線功能時的UCC檢查。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, customs ruling, legal opinion, or a substitute for qualified legal review. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Uganda law, UNBS publication updates, the customs release process at Mombasa and Dar es Salaam, Ministry of Gender and Labour directives, UCC radio rules, and the national health regulator route before shipment or placing products on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、海关裁定、法律意见或合规替代。出口商、进口商和分销商在出货或投放市场前，应核验现行乌干达法规、UNBS发布内容、蒙巴萨和达累斯萨拉姆口岸清关流程、妇女事务、性别与劳动部要求、UCC无线规则及国家卫生监管路径。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、海關裁定、法律意見或合規替代。出口商、進口商和分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應核驗現行烏干達法規、UNBS發布內容、蒙巴薩與達累斯薩拉姆口岸清關流程、婦女事務、性別與勞工部要求、UCC無線規則及國家衛生監管路徑。

answer_first.en: Uganda requires UNBS-aligned conformity evidence through PVoC and a UNBS Certificate of Conformity, plus importer-linked readiness and Q-Mark controls for regulated routes. Chinese GB 2626 and GB 19083 documents are a domestic starting point only and do not automatically satisfy Uganda import clearance. Occupational respirators must follow EN 149 class requirements as adopted by UNBS, while medical-mask claims remain a separate national health pathway.
answer_first.zh: 乌干达要求进口呼吸器提交UNBS路线下的PVoC与UNBS合格证、进出口申报人责任链和Q标控制。中国的GB 2626与GB 19083资料只在国内阶段有效，不能自动替代乌干达清关与放行依据。职业防护口罩应按UNBS采用的EN 149等级体系处理；医用口罩类主张仍应走国家卫生监管路径。
answer_first.zht: 烏干達要求進口呼吸器提交UNBS路線下的PVoC與UNBS合格證、進出口申報人責任鏈和Q標控制。中國的GB 2626與GB 19083資料只在國內階段有效，不能自動替代烏干達清關與放行依據。職業防護口罩應按UNBS採用的EN 149等級體系處理；醫用口罩類主張仍應走國家衛生監管路徑。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, accessed date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator (UNBS, Ministry of Gender and Labour, Ministry of Health), standards body, customs authority, and primary legal source preferred.
